ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "city_location" TEXT /* Location of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the official */,
  "official_email" TEXT /* Email of the official */,
  "official_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urban_planners" (
  "planner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planner */,
  "planner_name" TEXT /* Name of the planner */,
  "planner_email" TEXT /* Email of the planner */,
  "planner_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the planner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("planner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "researcher_email" TEXT /* Email of the researcher */,
  "researcher_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "duration_sec" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in seconds */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used for the trip */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., Subscriber, Customer) */,
  "bike_share_for_all_trip" INTEGER /* Whether the trip was part of a bike-sharing program for all */,
  "trip_distance" REAL /* Distance of the trip in kilometers or miles */,
  "trip_route" TEXT /* Route taken during the trip */,
  "trip_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the trip */,
  "trip_weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the station is located */,
  "station_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of bikes the station can hold */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of bike (e.g., road bike, mountain bike) */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Whether the bike is currently available for rental */,
  "bike_model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "bike_year" INTEGER /* Year the bike was manufactured */,
  "bike_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., Subscriber, Customer) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_stations" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the start station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end station */,
  "start_city" TEXT /* City where the trip started */,
  "end_city" TEXT /* City where the trip ended */,
  "start_station_status" TEXT /* Status of the start station */,
  "end_station_status" TEXT /* Status of the end station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_stations_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_stations_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_bikes" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used for the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_bikes_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Duration of the trip in seconds
ID of the bike used for the trip
Whether the trip was part of a bike-sharing program for all
Distance of the trip in kilometers or miles
City where the station is located
Number of bikes the station can hold
Type of bike (e.g., road bike, mountain bike)
Whether the bike is currently available for rental
ID of the bike used for the trip
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the user accessing the system
Time when the user accessed the system
IP address of the user accessing the system
Device used to access the system
